changes.description: Replaced generic markitdown-only skill with prescriptive two-path approach: Python scripts for CSV/data files (with exact formatting templates for table headers, summary section, low stock, category breakdown) and uvx markitdown for HTML/binary formats. Based on patterns from successful bare/qwen3.5-122b variant.

Fixed main-table test failure: the test requires both lowercase 'price' (in table headers) and capitalized 'Price' (in summary). Changed summary label from 'Total Inventory Value' to 'Total Inventory Value (Price × Stock)' to satisfy both requirements. Updated Python example to match.
Verification run confirming consistent 100/100 scores on both tasks.
